message:
Add IVF index support for ANN vector search

- Add IVFIndex class to parse and load IVF indexes from Lance datasets
- Parse index metadata from manifest (field 6 = index_section)
- Parse centroids tensor from index.idx files
- Implement findNearestPartitions() for centroid-based routing
- Update RemoteLanceFile to auto-load IVF index on open
- Add hasIndex() method to check if ANN is available
- Update vectorSearch() to use index when available
- Falls back to brute-force when index not found

Index location: dataset.lance/_indices/<uuid>/index.idx
This enables faster vector search by only scanning relevant
partitions instead of the entire dataset.
